zh.title: 托克维尔预言全集 - 《论美国的民主》中的15条政治预见与验证 | Tocqueville Prophecies
zh.description: 法国政治思想家托克维尔（1805-1859）在《论美国的民主》和《旧制度与大革命》中预见了美俄冷战、多数人暴政、媒体极化、民主社会的物质主义与个人主义危机等。15条预言逐条验证。
zh.keywords: 托克维尔,论美国的民主,多数人暴政,美俄冷战预言,软专制,民主预言,Tocqueville,Democracy in America,政治预言
zh.ogTitle: 托克维尔预言全集 | Tocqueville Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 法国政治思想家托克维尔在《论美国的民主》中预见了美俄冷战、多数人暴政、媒体极化等15条政治预言，逐条对照历史验证。
zh.twitterDescription: 托克维尔15条政治预言：预见美俄冷战、多数人暴政、软专制、媒体极化。《论美国的民主》中的先见之明。

en.title: Tocqueville Prophecies - 15 Political Predictions from Democracy in America | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: French political thinker Alexis de Tocqueville (1805-1859) foresaw the US-Russia Cold War, tyranny of the majority, soft despotism, media polarization, and individualism's dark side in Democracy in America. 15 predictions verified against history.
en.keywords: Tocqueville,Democracy in America,tyranny of the majority,US Russia Cold War prediction,soft despotism,political prophecy,Tocqueville predictions
en.ogTitle: Tocqueville Prophecies - Political Predictions from Democracy in America
en.ogDescription: 15 political predictions from Alexis de Tocqueville's Democracy in America, verified against 200 years of history. Cold War, soft despotism, media polarization, and more.
en.twitterDescription: 15 predictions from Tocqueville's Democracy in America: US-Russia Cold War, tyranny of the majority, soft despotism, media polarization. Verified against history.
